name: Google Meet
description: Join Google Meet calls through Chrome or Twilio transports.

defaults.meeting.label: Default Meeting
defaults.meeting.help: Meet URL, meeting code, or spaces/{id} used when commands omit a meeting.

preview.enrollmentAcknowledged.label: Preview Acknowledged
preview.enrollmentAcknowledged.help: Confirms you understand the Google Meet Media API is still Developer Preview.

defaultTransport.label: Default Transport
defaultTransport.help: Chrome uses a signed-in browser profile. Chrome-node runs Chrome on a paired node. Twilio uses Meet dial-in numbers.

defaultMode.label: Default Mode
defaultMode.help: Agent uses realtime transcription plus regular Autopus TTS. Bidi uses the realtime voice model directly. Transcribe observes only.

chrome.audioBackend.label: Chrome Audio Backend
chrome.audioBackend.help: BlackHole 2ch is required for local duplex audio routing.

chrome.guestName.label: Guest Name
chrome.guestName.help: Used when Chrome lands on the signed-out Meet guest-name screen.

chrome.reuseExistingTab.label: Reuse Existing Meet Tab
chrome.reuseExistingTab.help: Avoids opening duplicate tabs for the same Meet URL.

chrome.autoJoin.label: Auto Join Guest Screen
chrome.autoJoin.help: Best-effort guest-name fill and Join Now click through Autopus browser automation.

chrome.waitForInCallMs.label: Wait For In-Call (ms)
chrome.waitForInCallMs.help: Waits for Chrome to report that the Meet tab is in-call before the realtime intro speaks.

chrome.audioInputCommand.label: Audio Input Command
chrome.audioInputCommand.help: Command that writes meeting audio to stdout in chrome.audioFormat.

chrome.audioOutputCommand.label: Audio Output Command
chrome.audioOutputCommand.help: Command that reads assistant audio from stdin in chrome.audioFormat.

chrome.bargeInInputCommand.label: Barge-In Input Command
chrome.bargeInInputCommand.help: Optional Gateway-hosted microphone command that writes signed 16-bit little-endian mono PCM for human interruption detection while assistant playback is active.

chrome.bargeInRmsThreshold.label: Barge-In RMS Threshold
chrome.bargeInRmsThreshold.help: RMS level on chrome.bargeInInputCommand that counts as a human interruption.

chrome.bargeInPeakThreshold.label: Barge-In Peak Threshold
chrome.bargeInPeakThreshold.help: Peak level on chrome.bargeInInputCommand that counts as a human interruption.

chrome.bargeInCooldownMs.label: Barge-In Cooldown (ms)
chrome.bargeInCooldownMs.help: Minimum delay between repeated barge-in clears.

chrome.audioFormat.label: Audio Format
chrome.audioFormat.help: Command-pair audio format. PCM16 24 kHz is the default Chrome/Meet path; G.711 mu-law 8 kHz remains available for legacy command pairs.

chrome.audioBufferBytes.label: Audio Buffer Bytes
chrome.audioBufferBytes.help: SoX processing buffer for generated Chrome command-pair audio commands. Lower values reduce latency but may underrun on busy hosts.

chromeNode.node.label: Chrome Node
chromeNode.node.help: Node id/name/IP that owns Chrome, BlackHole, and SoX for chrome-node transport.

voiceCall.dtmfDelayMs.label: Legacy DTMF Delay (ms)
voiceCall.dtmfDelayMs.help: Compatibility setting from the old post-connect DTMF flow. Twilio Meet joins now play DTMF before realtime connect.

voiceCall.postDtmfSpeechDelayMs.label: Legacy Post-DTMF Speech Delay (ms)
voiceCall.postDtmfSpeechDelayMs.help: Compatibility setting from the old delayed-speech flow. Twilio Meet joins now carry the intro as the initial Voice Call message.

realtime.strategy.label: Realtime Strategy
realtime.strategy.help: Legacy realtime alias setting. Use mode=agent or mode=bidi for new Meet joins.

realtime.provider.label: Speech Provider
realtime.provider.help: Compatibility fallback for both realtime transcription and bidi voice. Prefer realtime.transcriptionProvider and realtime.voiceProvider for new configs.

realtime.transcriptionProvider.label: Realtime Transcription Provider
realtime.transcriptionProvider.help: Agent mode uses this provider to transcribe meeting audio before regular Autopus TTS answers.

realtime.voiceProvider.label: Bidi Voice Provider
realtime.voiceProvider.help: Bidi mode uses this realtime voice provider. Falls back to realtime.provider when unset.

realtime.model.label: Bidi Realtime Model
realtime.model.help: Only used by mode=bidi. Agent mode answers with the configured Autopus agent and regular TTS.

realtime.introMessage.label: Realtime Intro Message
realtime.introMessage.help: Spoken once when the realtime bridge is ready. Set to an empty string to join silently.

realtime.agentId.label: Realtime Consult Agent
realtime.agentId.help: Autopus agent id used by autopus_agent_consult. Defaults to "main".

realtime.toolPolicy.label: Realtime Tool Policy
realtime.toolPolicy.help: Safe read-only tools are available by default; owner requests can unlock broader tools.

oauth.expiresAt.label: Cached Access Token Expiry
oauth.expiresAt.help: Unix epoch milliseconds used only for the cached access-token fast path.

instructions.default: You are joining a private Google Meet as an Autopus voice transport. Keep spoken replies brief and natural. In agent mode, wait for Autopus consult results and speak them exactly. In bidi mode, answer directly and call autopus_agent_consult for deeper reasoning, current information, or tools.

introMessage.default: Say exactly: I'm here and listening.

agentId.description: Autopus agent id used by autopus_agent_consult. Defaults to "main".
